name: Heloise's Flavored Coffee Mixes
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the ingredients for each flavored coffee mix separately.
2. To make one cup of flavored coffee, place two rounded teaspoons of the desired mix into a cup.
3. Pour hot water over the coffee mix and stir until dissolved.
4. Adjust sweetness by adding artificial sweetener according to preference, using an equivalent amount as specified on the product label.
5. Store the mixed coffee in an air-tight container for later use.
